description: Catalog of legal agreement templates sourced from Common Paper (https://github.com/CommonPaper). Each entry references a markdown file in ./templates and is licensed under CC BY 4.0. The system will load these as baselines and modify them per user.

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum — supplemental terms for incorporating AI/ML provisions into a master agreement.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement (BAA) — HIPAA-compliant terms governing handling of protected health information.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement (CSA) — main contract for procuring cloud/SaaS services.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement — early-stage collaboration terms between a vendor and a design-partner customer.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper Data Processing Agreement (DPA) — GDPR/UK-GDPR-aligned terms for personal-data processing.

templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper Mutual NDA — bilateral confidentiality terms for sharing information between two parties.

templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement — Cover Page
templates.description: Common Paper Mutual NDA cover/signature page — to be completed and executed alongside the Mutual NDA.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement — terms governing a strategic partnership between two organizations.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement — short-form terms for a limited-scope trial of a product or service.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement (PSA) — terms for engaging a vendor to deliver services.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper Service Level Agreement (SLA) — uptime, support, and credit terms to attach to a primary service contract.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement — terms for licensing on-prem or downloadable software.
